title: AlphaBAG Protocol TGE Strategy Unveiled
content: The core team has released the official roadmap for the $BAG token generation event. Early contributors are prioritized for the genesis allocation.

title: Bitcoin Sustains Support at $120k
content: BTC continues to consolidate above the key psychological barrier of $120,000 as institutional inflows remain steady through the quarter.

title: Solana Ecosystem V3 Upgrade Live
content: The latest mainnet upgrade for Solana has successfully reduced latency by 40%, triggering a surge in DEX activity across the network.
